category_sources: Official repo https://github.com/mikefarah/yq describes yq as a command-line processor for structured data formats.
source_facts.description says it processes YAML, JSON, XML, CSV and properties documents from the CLI.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains quick usage and links to complete documentation.
Official GitHub repo links to mikefarah.gitbook.io/yq as the project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplies https://github.com/mikefarah/yq; repo returned null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repo topics/README identify YAML, JSON, XML, CSV, TOML, HCL and properties processing.
source_facts.description lists YAML, JSON, XML, CSV and CLI usage.
